data.name: VatReturn_Description
data.value: Generate a VAT return report for any period — output tax, input tax, and net VAT payable.

data.name: TaxRates_Description
data.value: Configure VAT rate categories, effective dates, and defaults.

data.name: TaxPeriods_Description
data.value: Lock tax periods to prevent modifications to transactions within their date range.

data.name: Export_Description
data.value: Generate a one-click ZIP package with all financial statements and journal entries for your external accountant.
